lighting.shadow_character: Deep, high-contrast shadows with sharp edges (Chiaroscuro)

color.grading_style: High-contrast S-curve with crushed blacks, film look
color.similar_film_stock: Kodak Portra 400 (pushed 1-stop) or Fujifilm Classic Chrome

composition.focus_point: Raspberries in the center of the bowl

texture.detail_rendering: Effectively emphasizes the texture of raspberries and the bowl's surface through hard light and shadow.

improvement_notes: For commercial use, consider adding a fill light (bounce card) to soften shadows, locally increasing the luminance of the red channel for a more appetizing look, and pulling back the camera to create more negative space for text layouts.
nano_banana_prompt: /imagine prompt: [Subject: A minimalist shot of a rustic ceramic bowl filled with fresh blueberries on a plain off-white surface], [Style: Moody and atmospheric food photography, cinematic, fine art], [Lighting: Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, single hard light source from top-left creating long, deep, and sharp shadows across the frame], [Color: A high-contrast color palette with rich, saturated blues of the blueberries against desaturated neutrals, deep crushed blacks, warm highlights, shot on Kodak Portra 400 pushed one-stop], [Composition: High-angle close-up shot, strong diagonal composition created by light and shadow, minimalist and clean], [Details: Visible fine film grain, sharp focus on the blueberries, texture of the ceramic is visible], [Camera: Shot with an 85mm lens at f/4, shallow depth of field] --ar 4:5 --style raw
